title: Event
description: Engine -> dashboard, published to neuraroute/event and streamed over the engine /ws. One schema, discriminated by 'type'. Most fields are optional so the dashboard can render whatever a given event carries.

device_id.description: device the event is about (e.g. where a task was placed)

from_device.description: on failover: the device that dropped

reason.description: human-readable scheduler reason, shown on the projector

score.description: scheduler score breakdown for the chosen device (latency/energy/cost/privacy terms)

metrics.description: baseline-vs-orchestrated numbers on a metrics event
